title: Continue phlebotomist assignment and area-matching backend logic

requirements.text: Complete the phlebotomist-to-hospital assignment backend logic: ensure the assignPhlebotomistToHospital and removePhlebotomistFromHospital functions correctly update the phlebotomist-hospital assignments map, validate that the phlebotomist exists and has the correct role, and persist changes across upgrades.

quotes: phlebotomist assignment and area-matching may still need a follow-up build to complete

acceptanceCriteria: Super admin can assign a phlebotomist to a hospital and the assignment is persisted
Super admin can remove a phlebotomist from a hospital and the removal is persisted
Assigning a non-existent principal or non-phlebotomist role returns an appropriate error
Assignments survive canister upgrade via migration

requirements.text: Complete area-matching logic: when a phlebotomist logs in or is assigned, match them to hospitals in the same city/area field. Expose a backend query that returns hospitals assigned to the calling phlebotomist filtered by their area, so the AddHospitalSamplePage and HomeCollectionQueuePage only show relevant hospitals.

quotes: phlebotomist assignment and area-matching may still need a follow-up build to complete

acceptanceCriteria: A query getAssignedHospitals returns only hospitals linked to the calling phlebotomist's principal
If area filtering is applicable, hospitals are filtered to match the phlebotomist's area field
The frontend AddHospitalSamplePage hospital selector uses this query instead of fetching all hospitals

requirements.text: Validate the hospital management flow end-to-end: the HospitalManagementPage must correctly reflect add, edit, and disable operations using the updated backend functions, with proper optimistic UI updates and error toasts.

quotes: could you check if the hospital list, add/edit/disable flow, and search are working as expected

acceptanceCriteria: Adding a hospital via AddHospitalModal creates a new entry visible in the list immediately after success
Editing a hospital via EditHospitalModal updates the displayed fields without a full page reload
Disabling a hospital removes it from the active list or marks it visually as disabled
Search filters hospitals by name, city, or area in real time

requirements.text: Ensure the HospitalDetailsPage phlebotomist assignment UI (assign/remove actions and search panel) is correctly wired to the backend assignment functions, with confirmation dialogs and success/error toasts reflecting the actual backend response.

quotes: phlebotomist assignment and area-matching may still need a follow-up build to complete

acceptanceCriteria: Assigning a phlebotomist from the search panel calls the backend and shows a success toast
Removing a phlebotomist shows a confirmation dialog before calling the backend
The phlebotomist list on HospitalDetailsPage refreshes after any assignment change
Errors from the backend are surfaced as error toasts

constraints: All Motoko logic must remain in backend/main.mo as a single actor
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Generate migration.mo only if stable state variables are added or changed
nonGoals: Adding new user roles beyond existing ones
Redesigning any UI pages not directly involved in hospital management or phlebotomist assignment
